plugins.description: Workflow skills for Claude Code and Cursor - an adaptive flow conductor plus grilling, deslop, knowledge memory, PR babysitting, handoff, a git-ops owner, team-communication drafting, skill authoring, env preflight/bootstrap, and post-merge verification; ships auto-recall, runbook-hint, and handoff-nudge hooks.
